analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观环境呈现风险规避（VIX高企、DXY走强），但日元疲软暗示部分风险资金流动，形成分歧。驱动力主要是技术性反弹与爆仓清理，而非基本面改变，属于已定价的熊市反弹。参考【Qlib排名】，ETH、BNB、SOL相对较强（负分较小），但所有币种RSI均在41-43区间，未达超卖（<30），且成交量Z-Score均为负值（-1.23至-1.36），显示反弹缺乏买盘支持。【痛苦交易】ETH、SOL、BNB、BTC的多空爆仓比均>2.5（最高BNB达156.9），表明零售多头正被大规模清洗，形成“燃料”，但L/S比过高意味着短期反弹可能受限；资金费率全为负值（-0.0026%至-0.0110%），零售空头拥挤，存在轧空潜力，但需等待RSI极端或下影线确认。【假设分析】选择“鲸鱼前跑”（WHALE_FRONT_RUN），基于ETH的鲸鱼积累信号（24小时净流入24,430 ETH + 稳定币净流入$102,137），在零售恐慌时跟随聪明钱。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with a risk-off macro environment (high VIX, strong DXY), but Yen weakness suggests some risk-on flows, creating divergence. The driver is primarily technical bounce and liquidation cleanup, not fundamental change, making it a priced-in bear market rally. 【Qlib rankings】show ETH, BNB, SOL are relatively stronger (less negative scores), but all coins have RSI in 41-43 range (not oversold <30), and volume Z-Scores are negative (-1.23 to -1.36), indicating weak buying support. 【Pain Trade】L/S liquidation ratios for ETH, SOL, BNB, BTC are all >2.5 (BNB up to 156.9), showing retail longs being heavily flushed, providing 'fuel', but high L/S ratios limit short-term bounce potential; funding rates are all negative (-0.0026% to -0.0110%), indicating crowded retail shorts with squeeze potential, but need RSI extremes or wick confirmation. 【Scenario】Select 'WHALE_FRONT_RUN', based on ETH whale accumulation signal (24h net inflow 24,430 ETH + stablecoin inflow $102,137) to follow smart money during retail panic.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最严重的冲突数据：1）所有币种RSI未达超卖（41-43），不符合均值回归的严格条件（<30），盲目做多可能接飞刀；2）成交量Z-Score全为负值，反弹缺乏量能支持；3）宏观熊市环境（价格低于SMA200）下，趋势跟随做多风险高。忽略理由：鲸鱼数据（ETH净流入+稳定币流入）显示聪明钱在下跌中积累，覆盖了技术面弱点；且多空爆仓比高（ETH L/S=2.54）提供轧空燃料，等待4小时蜡烛下影线或RSI背离可入场。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: 1) All coins' RSI not oversold (41-43), failing strict mean reversion criteria (<30), risking catching a falling knife; 2) Volume Z-Scores all negative, indicating weak bounce support; 3) Bear macro regime (price < SMA200) makes trend-following longs risky. Justification for ignoring: Whale data (ETH net inflow + stablecoin inflow) shows smart money accumulating during dips, overriding technical weaknesses; high L/S ratios (e.g., ETH L/S=2.54) provide squeeze fuel; entry can be timed with 4H wick or RSI divergence.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：ETH价格$1987.54，低于SMA50（$2002.71），趋势偏空；RSI 43.06中性偏弱，ADX 17.8趋势弱，NATR 2.22%波动适中，上影线比率59%显示上方阻力。整体处于熊市中的弱势反弹。
technical_signal.en: Technical: ETH price $1987.54, below SMA50 ($2002.71), bearish trend; RSI 43.06 neutral-weak, ADX 17.8 weak trend, NATR 2.22% moderate volatility, upper wick ratio 59% shows resistance. Overall weak bounce in bear market.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH 24小时净流入24,430.1 ETH（7天趋势一致），稳定币净流入$102,137，表明鲸鱼在价格下跌时积累；资金费率-0.0110%（负值），零售空头拥挤；多空爆仓比2.54，零售多头被清洗。SOL有净流入但稳定币流出，信号较弱。
macro_onchain.en: Whale flow: ETH 24h net inflow 24,430.1 ETH (consistent 7d trend), stablecoin inflow $102,137, indicating whale accumulation during price drop; funding -0.0110% (negative), retail shorts crowded; L/S ratio 2.54, retail longs flushed. SOL has inflow but stablecoin outflow, weaker signal.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：ETH排名第一（-0.0664分），相对最强；BNB第二（-0.0779），SOL第三（-0.0825）。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score全为负（-1.23至-1.36），统计上显著低于均值，确认买盘不足；资金费率Z-Score ETH最低（-3.17），显示极度负资金费率异常。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib analysis: ETH ranks 1st (-0.0664 score), relatively strongest; BNB 2nd (-0.0779), SOL 3rd (-0.0825). Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all negative (-1.23 to -1.36), statistically below mean, confirming weak buying; funding Z-Score ETH lowest (-3.17), indicating extreme negative funding anomaly.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1）RSI 43.06未达极端，ADX 17.8趋势弱，NATR 2.22%波动正常；2）上影线比率59%较高，显示阻力，下影线16%较低；3）多空爆仓比2.54，零售多头被清洗；4）鲸鱼净流向为正（积累）。最终判断：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底吸筹），因价格下跌中鲸鱼持续流入，零售恐慌提供机会，但需等待技术确认避免接飞刀。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 43.06 not extreme, ADX 17.8 weak trend, NATR 2.22% normal volatility; 2) Upper wick ratio 59% high (resistance), lower wick 16% low; 3) L/S ratio 2.54, retail longs flushed; 4) Whale net flow positive (accumulation). Verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION, as whales accumulate during price drop with retail panic, but await technical confirmation to avoid catching a falling knife.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓：BNB（做多，亏损-0.43%）、SOL（做多，盈利0.28%）、ETH（做多，盈利1.53%），总多头敞口$1505，可用多头额度$341。风险：所有持仓均处于熊市，需警惕反弹失败；ETH持仓已盈利，可考虑部分止盈。
portfolio_status.en: Portfolio: BNB (long, -0.43% PnL), SOL (long, 0.28% PnL), ETH (long, 1.53% PnL), total long exposure $1505, available long room $341. Risk: All positions in bear market, watch for bounce failure; ETH position profitable, consider partial profit-taking.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：在熊市中，即使有鲸鱼信号，也需等待RSI极端或下影线确认，避免浮动亏损（如之前SOL仓位-11.94%）。本次决策更谨慎，优先管理现有仓位，仅基于强鲸鱼积累信号考虑新入场。
reflection.en: Learned from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation to avoid floating losses (e.g., previous SOL position -11.94%). This decision is more cautious, prioritizing existing position management and only considering new entries based on strong whale accumulation signals.

entry_reason.en: Based on WHALE_FRONT_RUN: 1) ETH 24h net inflow 24,430.1 ETH, stablecoin inflow $102,137, clear whale accumulation; 2) Funding -0.0110% negative, retail shorts crowded; 3) L/S ratio 2.54, retail longs flushed providing squeeze fuel; 4) Qlib ranks 1st. Entry upon 4H wick or RSI<40.

invalidation.en: Invalidate if whale net flow turns negative or price breaks $1930 (based on NATR 2.22%×1.5≈3.33% stop distance).

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观环境呈现风险规避信号（DXY走强、VIX飙升），但日元疲软提供部分风险偏好。Qlib排名显示ETH相对最强（-0.0323分），但所有币种得分均为负值，表明整体市场疲软。Z-Score显示成交量普遍偏低（vol_z均<-0.9），资金费率Z-Score为负（funding_z均<-0.76），表明零售空头拥挤。结合【痛苦交易】，ETH、SOL、BNB、BTC均出现高多空爆仓比（L/S>2.5），显示零售多头正在被清洗，但燃料（空头爆仓）尚未耗尽（L/S>0.2）。选择【假设分析】剧本：WHALE_FRONT_RUN，跟随鲸鱼在零售恐慌时的积累信号。

Qlib ranking shows ETH as relatively strongest (-0.0323 score), but all coins have negative scores, indicating overall weakness. Z-Scores show low volume (vol_z all <-0.9) and negative funding Z-Scores (funding_z all <-0.76), indicating crowded retail shorts. Combined with 【Pain Trade】, ETH, SOL, BNB, BTC all have high long/short liquidation ratios (L/S>2.5), showing retail longs being flushed, but fuel (short liquidations) is not exhausted (L/S>0.2). Selected 【Scenario】: WHALE_FRONT_RUN, following whale accumulation during retail panic.

contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: 1) Market in bear regime with price below SMA50 and downtrend; 2) Volume Z-Scores negative, indicating lack of momentum for rallies. Ignored because: Whale data shows significant token net inflow for ETH and SOL in 24h (ETH 24,430.1 ETH, SOL 16,924.1 SOL) with positive stablecoin net flow (ETH $102,137), indicating whale accumulation during price drops, overriding technical weakness. Additionally, high L/S ratios (e.g., SOL L/S=41.77) show retail longs being flushed, providing fuel for potential squeezes.

technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have RSI in 41-43 range (not oversold), ADX 13-20 (weak trend), NATR 1.44%-2.46% (moderate volatility). Prices below 4H SMA50 (-0.55% to -2.78%) indicate short-term downtrend. Wick ratios show ETH lower wick 42% (strong support), SOL lower wick 25% (moderate support).

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH和SOL在24小时内代币净流入为正（积累），稳定币净流入ETH为正（$102,137），SOL为负（$-127,232）。资金费率均为负（-0.0030%至-0.0094%），零售空头拥挤。爆仓数据：ETH L/S=2.55，SOL L/S=41.77，BNB L/S=160.33，BTC L/S=3.44，显示零售多头被大量清洗。
macro_onchain.en: Whale data: ETH and SOL show positive token net inflow in 24h (accumulation), with stablecoin net flow positive for ETH ($102,137) and negative for SOL ($-127,232). Funding rates all negative (-0.0030% to -0.0094%), indicating crowded retail shorts. Liquidation: ETH L/S=2.55, SOL L/S=41.77, BNB L/S=160.33, BTC L/S=3.44, showing heavy retail long flushing.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：ETH排名第一（-0.0323分），相对最强，但所有币种得分均为负，市场整体疲软。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score普遍<-0.9（成交量低迷），资金费率Z-Score<-0.76（负资金费率显著低于历史均值），支持零售空头拥挤的叙事。
quantitative_analysis.en: Quantitative analysis: Qlib ranks ETH first (-0.0323 score), relatively strongest, but all coins have negative scores, indicating overall market weakness. Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all <-0.9 (low volume), funding Z-Scores <-0.76 (negative funding significantly below historical mean), supporting the narrative of crowded retail shorts.

regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 41-43 (not oversold), ADX 13-20 (weak trend), NATR moderate; 2) ETH lower wick 42% (strong support), SOL lower wick 25% (moderate support); 3) High L/S ratios (>2.5), retail longs flushed; 4) Whale net flow: positive token inflow for ETH and SOL (accumulation). Final verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION, as whales accumulate during price drops with retail longs flushed, but short fuel not exhausted (L/S>0.2), providing potential squeeze opportunities.

This decision is more cautious, prioritizing existing position management and only considering new entries based on strong whale accumulation signals.

entry_reason.zh: 开仓理由：基于鲸鱼前跑剧本。1）Qlib排名第二（-0.0506分），相对较强；2）爆仓数据显示极端零售多头清洗（L/S=160.33），燃料充足；3）资金费率负（-0.0063%），零售空头拥挤；4）技术面：RSI 42.6未超卖，下影线36%显示支撑，价格接近前低624.20。在熊市中使用低杠杆（3x）跟随鲸鱼积累信号。
entry_reason.en: Entry reason: Based on WHALE_FRONT_RUN scenario. 1) Qlib ranks second (-0.0506 score), relatively strong; 2) Liquidation shows extreme retail long flush (L/S=160.33), fuel ample; 3) Funding negative (-0.0063%), retail shorts crowded; 4) Technicals: RSI 42.6 not oversold, lower wick 36% shows support, price near previous low 624.20. Use low leverage (3x) in bear market to follow whale accumulation signals.

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破615.0（低于前低624.20）或资金费率转正（零售多头拥挤），则退出。止损距离3.0%（基于NATR 1.44% × 1.5 ≈ 2.16%，实际3.0%满足要求）。
invalidation.en: Exit if price breaks below 615.0 (below previous low 624.20) or funding turns positive (crowded retail longs). Stop distance 3.0% (based on NATR 1.44% × 1.5 ≈ 2.16%, actual 3.0% meets requirement).

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（所有币种价格低于SMA200），没有突发新闻驱动，价格下跌属于熊市延续，已定价。Qlib排名显示ETH相对最强（-0.0531分），但所有币种得分均为负值，表明整体弱势。Z-Score显示成交量普遍偏低（vol_z约-1.0），资金费率Z-Score为负（funding_z最低-2.65），零售空头拥挤。结合【痛苦交易】，ETH、SOL、BNB、BTC均出现高多空爆仓比（L/S>2.0），零售多头被大量清洗，但价格未进一步暴跌，显示鲸鱼可能在托底吸筹。然而，SOL的24h鲸鱼净流入（16,924 SOL）伴随稳定币净流出（-$118,234），可能为交易所陷阱。选择【鲸鱼前跑】剧本，跟随ETH的鲸鱼积累信号，但避开SOL的潜在派发风险。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (all coins below SMA200) with no new impulse drivers; the price drop is a continuation of the bear trend, already priced in. Qlib rankings show ETH as relatively strongest (-0.0531 score), but all scores are negative, indicating overall weakness. Z-Scores reveal low volume (vol_z ~ -1.0) and negative funding Z-Scores (funding_z as low as -2.65), indicating crowded retail shorts. Combined with 【Pain Trade】, ETH, SOL, BNB, and BTC show high long/short liquidation ratios (L/S > 2.0), with retail longs heavily flushed, yet prices haven't collapsed further, suggesting whale accumulation. However, SOL's 24h whale net inflow (16,924 SOL) with stablecoin net outflow (-$118,234) may be an exchange trap. Selecting 【WHALE_FRONT_RUN】 scenario to follow ETH's whale accumulation signal while avoiding SOL's potential distribution risk.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最严重的冲突数据：SOL的鲸鱼数据显示24h代币净流入（16,924 SOL）但稳定币净流出（-$118,234），这可能表明鲸鱼在向交易所转移代币进行派发，而非吸筹。同时，SOL的L/S爆仓比高达41.77，显示零售多头已被极端清洗，但价格未反弹，暗示燃料可能已耗尽。忽略此信号，因为ETH的鲸鱼数据更可靠（代币净流入24,430 ETH且稳定币净流入$102,137），且ETH在Qlib排名第一，相对强度更高。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signal: SOL's whale data shows 24h token net inflow (16,924 SOL) but stablecoin net outflow (-$118,234), which may indicate whales moving tokens to exchanges for distribution, not accumulation. Additionally, SOL's L/S liquidation ratio is extremely high at 41.77, showing retail longs heavily flushed, but price hasn't rebounded, suggesting fuel may be drained. This signal is ignored because ETH's whale data is more reliable (token net inflow 24,430 ETH with stablecoin net inflow $102,137), and ETH ranks first in Qlib with higher relative strength.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI在40-42区间（未超卖），ADX约18-21（趋势弱），NATR在1.44%-2.47%（中等波动）。ETH价格$1982.99低于SMA50（$2003.48），但上下影线比率显示下影线较长（57%），暗示支撑。
technical_signal.en: Technical summary: All coins have RSI in 40-42 range (not oversold), ADX ~18-21 (weak trend), NATR 1.44%-2.47% (moderate volatility). ETH price $1982.99 is below SMA50 ($2003.48), but lower wick ratio is high (57%), indicating support.

macro_onchain.en: Whale flow & funding analysis: ETH shows whale accumulation (24h token net inflow 24,430 ETH, stablecoin net inflow $102,137) with negative funding (-0.0087%), indicating crowded retail shorts. SOL's whale data is contradictory (token inflow but stablecoin outflow), with negative funding (-0.0045%). Global macro shows risk-off (strong DXY, high VIX).

quantitative_analysis.zh: 分析Qlib排名：ETH排名第一（-0.0531分），相对最强，但所有币种得分均为负，整体市场弱势。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score普遍-1.0左右，显示低成交量；资金费率Z-Score为负（ETH最低-2.65），统计上显著偏离，确认零售空头过度拥挤。
quantitative_analysis.en: Analyze Qlib rankings: ETH ranks first (-0.0531 score), relatively strongest, but all scores are negative, indicating overall market weakness. Z-Score significance: Volume Z-Scores around -1.0 show low volume; funding Z-Scores are negative (ETH lowest at -2.65), statistically significant deviations confirming overcrowded retail shorts.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 42.16（未超卖），ADX 18.4（趋势弱），NATR 2.37%（中等波动）；2) 上下影线比率：上影线40%/下影线57%，下影线长显示支撑；3) 多空爆仓比：2.89（零售多头被清洗）；4) 鲸鱼净流向：代币净流入24,430 ETH，稳定币净流入$102,137。最终判断：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底），因为价格下跌中鲸鱼积累，零售多头被清洗提供轧空燃料，但RSI未极端超卖，需低杠杆入场。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 42.16 (not oversold), ADX 18.4 (weak trend), NATR 2.37% (moderate volatility); 2) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: upper 40%/lower 57%, long lower wick shows support; 3) Liquidation long/short ratio: 2.89 (retail longs flushed); 4) Whale net flow direction: token net inflow 24,430 ETH, stablecoin net inflow $102,137. Conclude with explicit verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION, as whales are accumulating during price drop with retail longs flushed providing squeeze fuel, but RSI not extremely oversold requires low-leverage entry.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓风险评估：持有SOL多头（浮亏-0.24%）和ETH多头（浮盈1.11%）。总多头敞口$1001，可用多头空间$845，未超限。SOL持仓需监控鲸鱼陷阱风险，ETH持仓符合积累信号可持有。
portfolio_status.en: Portfolio risk check: Holding SOL long (floating loss -0.24%) and ETH long (floating profit 1.11%). Total long exposure $1001, available long room $845, within limits. SOL position needs monitoring for whale trap risk; ETH position aligns with accumulation signal and can be held.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：在熊市中，即使有鲸鱼信号，也需等待RSI极端或影线确认以避免浮动亏损（如之前SOL仓位-11.94%）。本次决策更谨慎，优先管理现有仓位而非新开仓，仅调整ETH止损以锁定利润。
reflection.en: Learned from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation to avoid floating losses (e.g., previous SOL position -11.94%). This decision is more cautious, prioritizing existing position management over new entries, only adjusting ETH stop loss to lock in profits.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观情绪极端恐惧（VIX 29.49），但日元疲软暗示部分风险偏好。新闻面显示加密扩张（OKX、哈萨克斯坦投资）与经济紧张并存，属于混合叙事，无明显新驱动力，价格下跌可能已部分定价悲观情绪。【Qlib排名】显示ETH（-0.0558）和BNB（-0.0604）相对最强，但所有币种得分均为负值，表明整体市场疲软；Z-Score异常显示成交量普遍偏低（Vol_Z均<-1.0），资金费率Z-Score为负（如ETH -2.33），表明零售空头拥挤。【痛苦交易】ETH、SOL、BNB的L/S爆仓比均>2.0（ETH 2.72，SOL 41.77，BNB 160.33），显示零售多头正被大量清洗，形成“燃料”供潜在轧空；但需警惕L/S比极高（如BNB 160.33）可能耗尽燃料。【假设分析】选择WHALE_FRONT_RUN剧本，基于鲸鱼积累信号（如ETH Token Net Flow 24h=105,500 ETH流入）与零售恐慌（负资金费率、高L/S比）的背离，跟随聪明钱在熊市中低杠杆买入。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200) with extreme fear (VIX 29.49), but Yen weakness suggests some risk appetite. News shows mixed narratives (crypto expansion vs economic nervousness), with no clear new impulse; price declines may have partially priced in pessimism.【Qlib Ratings】ETH (-0.0558) and BNB (-0.0604) rank strongest, but all scores are negative, indicating overall weakness; Z-Score anomalies show low volume (Vol_Z all <-1.0) and negative funding Z-Scores (e.g., ETH -2.33), signaling crowded retail shorts.【Pain Trade】L/S liquidation ratios for ETH, SOL, and BNB are all >2.0 (ETH 2.72, SOL 41.77, BNB 160.33), indicating heavy retail long flushing and potential squeeze fuel; but high ratios (e.g., BNB 160.33) risk fuel exhaustion.【Scenario】Select WHALE_FRONT_RUN, betting on whale accumulation signals (e.g., ETH Token Net Flow 24h=105,500 ETH inflow) diverging from retail panic (negative funding, high L/S ratios), using low leverage in bear market.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最严重的冲突数据：1）市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），通常应偏向做空，但鲸鱼积累信号强烈；2）BNB的L/S爆仓比高达160.33，可能已耗尽轧空燃料，增加反转风险。忽略理由：在熊市中，鲸鱼积累是罕见的高置信度信号，且ETH的L/S比（2.72）更适中，提供更安全燃料；通过低杠杆（2x）和严格止损管理风险。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: 1) Bear market (price < SMA200) typically favors shorts, but whale accumulation is strong; 2) BNB's L/S ratio is extremely high (160.33), potentially exhausting squeeze fuel and increasing reversal risk. Justification for ignoring: In bear markets, whale accumulation is a rare high-conviction signal, and ETH's L/S ratio (2.72) is more moderate for safer fuel; risk is managed via low leverage (2x) and strict stop-loss.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI在40-42区间（如ETH 42.07，BTC 40.34），处于中性偏弱但未超卖；ADX普遍<21（如ETH 18.4），趋势强度弱；NATR在1.43%-2.47%（如ETH 2.37%），波动率适中；上下影线比率显示ETH下影线57%较高，表明支撑。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have RSI in 40-42 range (e.g., ETH 42.07, BTC 40.34), neutral-weak but not oversold; ADX mostly <21 (e.g., ETH 18.4), weak trend strength; NATR 1.43%-2.47% (e.g., ETH 2.37%), moderate volatility; Wick ratios show ETH lower wick 57% high, indicating support.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH显示Token Net Flow 24h=105,500 ETH流入（7d趋势一致），Stablecoin Net Flow $102,137流入，表明鲸鱼在价格下跌时积累；资金费率均为负（如ETH -0.0072%），零售空头拥挤。BTC、BNB、DOGE无链上数据，依赖技术指标。
macro_onchain.en: Whale flow: ETH shows Token Net Flow 24h=105,500 ETH inflow (consistent 7d trend) and Stablecoin Net Flow $102,137 inflow, indicating whale accumulation during price drop; funding rates are negative (e.g., ETH -0.0072%), crowded retail shorts. BTC, BNB, DOGE lack on-chain data, relying on technicals.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：ETH排名第1（得分-0.0558），BNB第2（-0.0604），相对最强但得分均为负，反映市场整体疲软。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score均<-1.0（如SOL -1.22），表明交易清淡；资金费率Z-Score显著为负（ETH -2.33），统计偏差显示零售空头极端拥挤。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib analysis: ETH ranks 1st (score -0.0558), BNB 2nd (-0.0604), relatively strongest but all scores negative, reflecting overall market weakness. Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all <-1.0 (e.g., SOL -1.22), indicating low activity; funding Z-Scores significantly negative (ETH -2.33), statistical deviation shows extreme retail short crowding.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1）RSI 40-42未超卖，ADX<21趋势弱，NATR适中；2）ETH下影线比率57%高，显示支撑；3）L/S爆仓比ETH 2.72，SOL 41.77，BNB 160.33，零售多头被清洗；4）鲸鱼净流向ETH为正（流入）。最终判断：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底吸筹），因价格下跌中鲸鱼积累、零售恐慌（负资金费率、高L/S比），但需注意RSI未<30，避免接飞刀。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 40-42 not oversold, ADX<21 weak trend, NATR moderate; 2) ETH lower wick ratio 57% high, showing support; 3) L/S ratios ETH 2.72, SOL 41.77, BNB 160.33, retail longs flushed; 4) Whale net flow ETH positive (inflow). Verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION, due to whale accumulation during price drop and retail panic (negative funding, high L/S ratios), but caution as RSI not <30 to avoid catching knives.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观环境呈现风险规避（DXY走强，VIX高位），但日元疲软暗示部分风险偏好。Qlib排名显示BNB相对最强（排名1），但所有币种qlib_score均为负值，表明整体市场疲软。资金费率Z-Score普遍为负（BNB -1.45，ETH -1.64），显示零售空头拥挤，存在轧空潜力。结合【痛苦交易】，BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB的L/S爆仓比均大于2.5（最高BNB达164.15），表明零售多头正被大量清洗，为反弹提供燃料。然而，技术面RSI在40-44区间（未超卖），ADX低于21（趋势弱），缺乏明确反转信号。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置）：等待鲸鱼积累信号（如ETH/SOL的Token Net Flow转负）或RSI跌破30的极端情况，再考虑低杠杆做多。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with a risk-off macro backdrop (strong DXY, high VIX), though Yen weakness hints at some risk appetite. Qlib rankings show BNB as relatively strongest (rank 1), but all coins have negative qlib_scores, indicating overall weakness. Funding Z-Scores are universally negative (BNB -1.45, ETH -1.64), showing crowded retail shorts and squeeze potential. Combined with 【Pain Trade】, L/S liquidation ratios for BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB are all >2.5 (BNB高达164.15), indicating massive retail long flushes, providing fuel for a bounce. However, technicals show RSI in 40-44 range (not oversold), ADX <21 (weak trend), lacking clear reversal signals. Selected 【Hypothesis】Scenario 3 (Whale Front-Run): Wait for whale accumulation signals (e.g., negative Token Net Flow for ETH/SOL) or RSI dropping below 30 extremes before considering low-leverage longs.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI在40-44区间（中性偏弱，未超卖），ADX低于21（趋势弱），NATR在1.43%-2.47%（中等波动）。价格均低于4H SMA50（-0.56%至-2.77%），显示短期下跌趋势。上下影线比率显示ETH（上影39%/下影57%）和DOGE（上影33%/下影39%）有支撑迹象，但整体缺乏强劲反转信号。
technical_signal.en: Technicals: All coins have RSI in 40-44 range (neutral-weak, not oversold), ADX <21 (weak trend), NATR 1.43%-2.47% (moderate volatility). Prices are below 4H SMA50 (-0.56% to -2.77%), indicating short-term downtrend. Wick ratios show support signs for ETH (upper 39%/lower 57%) and DOGE (upper 33%/lower 39%), but overall lack strong reversal signals.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH和SOL的Token Net Flow在24h内为正（ETH 0.0，SOL 8,456.5），但7d趋势持平，未显示加速积累。稳定币净流量为负（SOL -$23,201），暗示流动性流出。资金费率均为负（BNB -0.0065%最负），Z-Score显著为负，零售空头拥挤。爆仓数据：BNB L/S比164.15（极高），ETH 2.72，SOL 41.77，BTC 3.50，显示零售多头正被大量清洗，为潜在轧空提供燃料。
macro_onchain.en: Whale Data: ETH and SOL have positive Token Net Flow over 24h (ETH 0.0, SOL 8,456.5), but 7d trends are flat, showing no accelerated accumulation. Stablecoin Net Flow is negative (SOL -$23,201), hinting at liquidity outflow. Funding rates are all negative (BNB -0.0065% most negative), with significantly negative Z-Scores, indicating crowded retail shorts. Liquidation data: BNB L/S ratio 164.15 (extremely high), ETH 2.72, SOL 41.77, BTC 3.50, showing massive retail long flushes, providing fuel for potential squeezes.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：BNB排名第1（qlib_score -0.0503），相对最强，但得分仍为负，反映市场疲软。ETH排名第2（-0.0608），DOGE第3（-0.0717），SOL第4（-0.0718），BTC第5（-0.0760）。成交量Z-Score普遍为负（-1.2至-1.27），显示低成交量环境。资金费率Z-Score异常显著（BNB -1.45，ETH -1.64），支持零售空头拥挤的叙事，但需结合鲸鱼流向验证。
quantitative_analysis.en: Quantitative Analysis: Qlib shows BNB rank 1 (qlib_score -0.0503), relatively strongest but still negative, reflecting market weakness. ETH rank 2 (-0.0608), DOGE 3 (-0.0717), SOL 4 (-0.0718), BTC 5 (-0.0760). Volume Z-Scores are universally negative (-1.2 to -1.27), indicating low-volume environment. Funding Z-Scores are significantly anomalous (BNB -1.45, ETH -1.64), supporting the crowded retail shorts narrative, but need validation with whale flows.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 40-44（未极端），ADX <21（趋势弱），NATR中等；2) 上下影线比率显示部分支撑（ETH下影57%），但整体不强烈；3) 多空爆仓比极高（BNB 164.15，SOL 41.77），零售多头正被清洗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOL的Token Net Flow为正但未加速，稳定币流出。最终判断：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（潜在）但未确认，因为鲸鱼流向不明确且RSI未超卖。当前处于熊市，避免接飞刀（KNIFE风险），等待更清晰信号。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 40-44 (not extreme), ADX <21 (weak trend), NATR moderate; 2) Wick ratios show some support (ETH lower 57%), but not strong overall; 3) L/S liquidation ratios extremely high (BNB 164.15, SOL 41.77), retail longs being flushed; 4) Whale net flow: ETH and SOL Token Net Flow positive but not accelerating, stablecoin outflow. Final verdict: POTENTIAL WHALE_ACCUMULATION but unconfirmed, due to ambiguous whale flows and RSI not oversold. In bear regime, avoid catching falling knives (KNIFE risk), wait for clearer signals.

reflection.en: Learned from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation to avoid floating losses (e.g., previous SOL position -11.94%). This decision is more cautious, prioritizing existing position management over new entries.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观风险情绪明显（VIX 29.49，DXY 98.99），但鲸鱼数据与零售情绪出现关键分歧。Qlib排名显示ETH、BNB相对最强（排名1-2），但Z-Score显示所有币种成交量均显著偏低（vol_z < -1.2），市场流动性萎缩。【痛苦交易】ETH、SOL、BNB、BTC均出现极端多头爆仓（L/S比率3.16-165.69），零售恐慌性抛售，但ETH和SOL的鲸鱼净流入（24h分别为-51.9万和+59.5万ETH/SOL）表明鲸鱼在趁机吸筹，形成“鲸鱼托底”陷阱。【假设分析】选择“鲸鱼前端交易”剧本：跟随鲸鱼在零售爆仓恐慌中低杠杆买入，但严格避免RSI未达极值的左侧交易。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality】Market is in bear regime (price < SMA200) with clear macro risk-off signals (VIX 29.49, DXY 98.99), but whale data diverges from retail sentiment. Qlib ranks ETH and BNB strongest (ranks 1-2), yet Z-Scores show all coins have significantly low volume (vol_z < -1.2), indicating liquidity contraction.【Pain Trade】ETH, SOL, BNB, BTC all show extreme long liquidations (L/S ratios 3.16-165.69) – retail panic selling – but ETH and SOL have whale net inflows (24h: -519k ETH, +595k SOL), suggesting whales are accumulating during the flush, creating a 'whale accumulation' trap.【Scenario】Select 'Whale Front-Run' playbook: follow whales with low leverage during retail capitulation, but strictly avoid left-side entries without extreme RSI.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面普遍超卖：ETH RSI 41.9，SOL RSI 40.2，BNB RSI 42.0，BTC RSI 39.4，均接近但未达30极值；ADX普遍<21（趋势弱）；波动率低（NATR 1.4-2.4%）。
technical_signal.en: Technicals broadly oversold: ETH RSI 41.9, SOL RSI 40.2, BNB RSI 42.0, BTC RSI 39.4 – all near but not at 30 extreme; ADX mostly <21 (weak trend); low volatility (NATR 1.4-2.4%).

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼流向：ETH 24h净流出-51.9万ETH（但7d净流出-305万，流出放缓），SOL 24h净流入+59.5万SOL（7d净流入+358万，加速吸筹）；资金费率全为负（ETH -0.0020%，SOL -0.0023%，BNB -0.0069%），零售做空拥挤。爆仓数据：ETH多头爆仓$7226万（L/S=3.16），SOL多头爆仓$190万（L/S=42.95），BNB多头爆仓$1575万（L/S=165.69），显示零售多头正被大规模清洗。
macro_onchain.en: Whale flows: ETH 24h net outflow -519k ETH (but 7d outflow -3.05M, slowing), SOL 24h net inflow +595k SOL (7d inflow +3.58M, accelerating accumulation); funding rates all negative (ETH -0.0020%, SOL -0.0023%, BNB -0.0069%) – retail shorts crowded. Liquidations: ETH longs $72.3M (L/S=3.16), SOL longs $1.9M (L/S=42.95), BNB longs $15.8M (L/S=165.69) – retail longs being massively flushed.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：ETH（-0.0786分，排名1）和BNB（-0.0789分，排名2）相对最强，但所有币种分数均为负，整体市场疲软。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score全部<-1.2（ETH -1.27，SOL -1.44），显示成交量统计性显著偏低，市场参与度不足；资金费率Z-Score全为负（ETH -1.13，BNB -1.51），确认做空情绪极端。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib ranks: ETH (-0.0786 score, rank 1) and BNB (-0.0789 score, rank 2) are relatively strongest, but all scores negative indicating overall market weakness. Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all <-1.2 (ETH -1.27, SOL -1.44) – statistically significant low volume, poor market participation; Funding Z-Scores all negative (ETH -1.13, BNB -1.51) confirming extreme short sentiment.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】1) RSI 39-42（未达<30极值），ADX 18-21（趋势弱），NATR 1.4-2.4%（波动适中）；2) 影线比率：ETH下影36%/上影21%，SOL下影0%/上影9%，显示ETH有支撑但SOL无；3) 多空爆仓比：ETH 3.16，SOL 42.95，BNB 165.69（极端多头爆仓）；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH 24h净流出（但7d趋势改善），SOL 24h净流入（加速）。结论：ETH为WHALE_ACCUMULATION（价格下跌中鲸鱼放缓流出，零售多头爆仓提供燃料），SOL为WHALE_ACCUMULATION（价格下跌中鲸鱼加速流入，零售多头爆仓极端），但两者RSI未达极值，需谨慎避免左侧交易。

Qlib rankings show DOGE as relatively strongest (-0.0719 score), but all scores are negative, indicating broad weakness; Z-Scores show universally low volume (vol_z all <-1.25) and funding rates negative or neutral except for SOL, suggesting pessimistic retail sentiment. Combining 【Pain Trade】, ETH, SOL, BTC, and BNB all show extreme long liquidations (L/S ratios >3), indicating massive retail long flush, but prices lack RSI<30 extreme oversold or clear lower wick support, placing this in a mid-stage 'liquidation cascade' with fuel still burning. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run), prioritizing ETH due to accelerating whale net inflow in 24h (-116K ETH vs 7d -3.6M ETH, showing reduced selling pressure) and negative funding, but awaiting RSI<30 or lower wick confirmation to avoid catching a falling knife.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓：SOL多头（入场价84.45，浮盈1.89%），ETH多头（入场价1972.04，浮盈1.26%），总风险暴露$1007，可用多头额度$841。持仓符合鲸鱼托底策略，但需监控上方阻力。
portfolio_status.en: Portfolio Status: Current positions: SOL long (entry 84.45, PnL 1.89%), ETH long (entry 1972.04, PnL 1.26%), total exposure $1007, available long room $841. Positions align with whale accumulation strategy, but monitor overhead resistance.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易反思：在熊市中，即使有鲸鱼信号，也应等待RSI极端值或影线确认，避免中性RSI入场导致浮动亏损（如之前SOL仓位-11.94%）。本次决策基于鲸鱼吸筹信号，但使用低杠杆和小仓位以管理波动。
reflection.en: Reflection from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation to avoid floating losses from neutral RSI entries (e.g., previous SOL position -11.94%). This decision is based on whale accumulation signals, but uses low leverage and small position size to manage volatility.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观风险情绪（VIX 26.33，DXY走强）与加密监管压力（KuCoin事件）构成负面背景，但美联储降息预期（利率期货下跌）和日元疲软提供部分风险偏好支撑。价格下跌伴随零售恐慌（多空爆仓比极高），但鲸鱼数据揭示分化：ETH和SOL出现鲸鱼积累信号（24h净流入），而BTC、BNB、DOGE缺乏链上确认。Qlib排名显示BTC相对最强（-0.0769分），但所有币种得分均为负值，反映整体弱势。结合【痛苦交易】，市场处于“爆仓踩踏”中（L/S比率均>5，零售多头被大量清洗），但ETH和SOL的鲸鱼净流入与价格下跌形成看涨背离，提供“燃料”支撑反弹。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置交易）：跟随ETH和SOL的鲸鱼积累信号，在零售恐慌中买入，但严格限制杠杆和仓位以应对熊市风险。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with negative macro sentiment (VIX 26.33, DXY strengthening) and crypto regulatory pressure (KuCoin incident). However, dovish Fed expectations (rate futures dropping) and Yen weakness offer some risk appetite support. Price declines coincide with retail panic (extremely high L/S ratios), but whale data reveals divergence: ETH and SOL show whale accumulation signals (24h net inflows), while BTC, BNB, and DOGE lack on-chain confirmation. Qlib rankings indicate BTC is relatively strongest (-0.0769 score), but all coins have negative scores, reflecting overall weakness. Combining 【Pain Trade】, the market is in a 'liquidation cascade' (L/S ratios all >5, retail longs heavily flushed), but ETH and SOL's whale net inflows vs price drops form bullish divergences, providing 'fuel' for a bounce. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run): follow whale accumulation signals in ETH and SOL to buy during retail panic, but strictly limit leverage and position size due to bear market risks.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面普遍超卖：所有币种RSI在41-44区间（未达极端<30），ADX在16-23（趋势强度中等），NATR在1.67%-2.87%（波动率适中）。BTC和SOL趋势为UP，但价格低于近期高点，显示反弹乏力。
technical_signal.en: Technicals are generally oversold: all coins have RSI in 41-44 range (not extreme <30), ADX 16-23 (moderate trend strength), NATR 1.67%-2.87% (moderate volatility). BTC and SOL trends are UP, but prices below recent highs indicate weak bounce momentum.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH（24h净流入1.27M ETH，7d净流出-2.36M ETH）和SOL（24h净流入54.5K SOL，7d净流入2.99M SOL）显示鲸鱼在加速积累，与价格下跌形成背离。资金费率全为负值（-0.0006%至-0.0092%），零售空头拥挤。爆仓数据：所有币种L/S比率>5（BTC 5.76，ETH 6.77，SOL 55.35，BNB 57.11），零售多头被大量清洗，提供轧空燃料。
macro_onchain.en: Whale data: ETH (24h net inflow 1.27M ETH, 7d net outflow -2.36M ETH) and SOL (24h net inflow 54.5K SOL, 7d net inflow 2.99M SOL) show whales accelerating accumulation, diverging from price drops. Funding rates are all negative (-0.0006% to -0.0092%), indicating crowded retail shorts. Liquidation data: all coins have L/S ratios >5 (BTC 5.76, ETH 6.77, SOL 55.35, BNB 57.11), with retail longs heavily flushed, providing squeeze fuel.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BTC（-0.0769分，第1名）相对最强，但得分均为负值，反映市场整体疲软。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score全为负（-1.44至-1.77），显示成交量萎缩；资金费率Z-Score为负（-0.43至-1.52），统计上偏离均值，确认零售空头过度拥挤。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib rankings: BTC (-0.0769 score, rank 1) is relatively strongest, but all scores are negative, reflecting overall market weakness. Z-Score anomalies: volume Z-Scores all negative (-1.44 to -1.77), indicating volume contraction; funding Z-Scores negative (-0.43 to -1.52), statistically deviating from mean, confirming excessive retail short crowding.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 41-44（未达极端），ADX 16-23（趋势强度中等），NATR 1.67%-2.87%（波动适中）；2) 影线比率：ETH上影21%/下影24%，SOL上影13%/下影25%，显示多空争夺；3) 多空爆仓比均>5，零售多头被大量清洗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOL为正向积累。最终判断：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底），因为价格下跌中鲸鱼积极买入（ETH和SOL净流入），零售多头恐慌性平仓（高L/S比），但RSI未达极端<30，需谨慎入场。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 41-44 (not extreme), ADX 16-23 (moderate trend strength), NATR 1.67%-2.87% (moderate volatility); 2) Wick ratios: ETH upper 21%/lower 24%, SOL upper 13%/lower 25%, showing battle between bulls and bears; 3) L/S ratios all >5, retail longs heavily flushed; 4) Whale net flow: positive accumulation in ETH and SOL. Verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION, as whales are actively buying during price drops (ETH and SOL net inflows) while retail longs panic-liquidate (high L/S ratios), but RSI not extreme <30 requires cautious entry.

reflection.en: Reflection from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation to avoid floating losses from neutral RSI entries (e.g., previous SOL position -11.94%). This decision is based on whale accumulation signals in ETH and SOL, but will use low leverage and small position size with wide stops to manage volatility.

entry_reason.zh: 鲸鱼托底吸筹：价格下跌中鲸鱼24h净流入1.27M ETH（加速积累），零售多头被大量清洗（L/S比6.77），资金费率负（-0.0021%）显示空头拥挤，存在轧空潜力。熊市下使用低杠杆（2x）和小仓位。
entry_reason.en: Whale accumulation: whales net inflow 1.27M ETH in 24h (accelerating accumulation) during price drop, retail longs heavily flushed (L/S ratio 6.77), funding negative (-0.0021%) indicates crowded shorts, squeeze potential. Use low leverage (2x) and small position in bear market.

invalidation.zh: 若价格跌破1900且鲸鱼净流转为流出，或RSI跌破30无反弹，则止损。
invalidation.en: Stop loss if price breaks below 1900 with whale net flow turning negative, or RSI drops below 30 without bounce.

entry_reason.zh: 鲸鱼前置交易：鲸鱼24h净流入54.5K SOL（7d净流入2.99M SOL持续积累），零售多头被极端清洗（L/S比55.35），资金费率负（-0.0032%）空头拥挤，技术面RSI 42未超卖但下影25%显示支撑。熊市下严格风险控制。
entry_reason.en: Whale front-run: whales net inflow 54.5K SOL in 24h (7d net inflow 2.99M SOL sustained accumulation), retail longs extremely flushed (L/S ratio 55.35), funding negative (-0.0032%) shorts crowded, technicals RSI 42 not oversold but lower wick 25% shows support. Strict risk control in bear market.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观风险情绪偏谨慎（VIX高企、DXY走强），但日元疲软暗示部分风险偏好。Qlib排名显示BTC相对最强（得分0.0014），但整体得分偏低，市场缺乏强劲驱动力。技术面普遍中性（RSI 46-50），无极端超买超卖。鲸鱼数据显示ETH和SOL出现分化：ETH 24h净流出（-0.04），而SOL 24h净流入（+0.39），表明鲸鱼在SOL上加速积累。结合【痛苦交易】分析，所有主要币种均出现严重多头爆仓（L/S比率>2），尤其是SOL（21.25）和BNB（23.37），显示零售多头正在被清洗，但价格未大幅下跌，暗示鲸鱼可能在托底吸筹。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置交易），跟随SOL的鲸鱼积累信号，在零售恐慌性抛售（多头爆仓）时买入。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with cautious macro risk sentiment (high VIX, strong DXY), but Yen weakness suggests some risk appetite. Qlib rankings show BTC as relatively strongest (score 0.0014), but overall scores are low, indicating lack of strong drivers. Technicals are neutral (RSI 46-50), with no extreme overbought/oversold conditions. Whale data shows divergence between ETH and SOL: ETH has 24h net outflow (-0.04), while SOL has 24h net inflow (+0.39), indicating accelerated whale accumulation in SOL. Combined with 【Pain Trade】analysis, all major coins show severe long liquidations (L/S ratio >2), especially SOL (21.25) and BNB (23.37), indicating retail longs are being flushed, but prices haven't collapsed, suggesting whales may be accumulating at support. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run), following SOL's whale accumulation signal to buy during retail panic (long liquidations).

technical_signal.zh: 技术面中性偏弱：BTC RSI 50.4（中性），ETH RSI 49.7（中性），SOL RSI 47.4（略偏弱），BNB RSI 46.7（略偏弱），DOGE RSI 47.0（略偏弱）。ADX普遍<25（趋势弱），NATR 1.5-2.7%（波动率中等）。上下影线显示SOL下影线比例低（6%上影/48%下影），表明近期卖压较强但可能有支撑。
technical_signal.en: Technicals neutral to weak: BTC RSI 50.4 (neutral), ETH RSI 49.7 (neutral), SOL RSI 47.4 (slightly weak), BNB RSI 46.7 (slightly weak), DOGE RSI 47.0 (slightly weak). ADX mostly <25 (weak trend), NATR 1.5-2.7% (moderate volatility). Wick ratios show SOL with low upper wick (6%) and high lower wick (48%), indicating recent selling pressure but potential support.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH 24h净流出137万枚（7d净流出242万枚），稳定币净流出756万美元，显示鲸鱼在减持。SOL 24h净流入5.45万枚（7d净流入299万枚），稳定币净流入30万美元，显示鲸鱼在加速积累。资金费率：BTC 0.0042%（略正），ETH 0.0023%（略正），SOL -0.0088%（负），BNB -0.0061%（负），DOGE -0.0082%（负），SOL和山寨币资金费率为负，表明零售空头拥挤。爆仓数据：所有币种多头爆仓远高于空头（L/S比率>2），SOL多头爆仓317万美元 vs 空头14.9万美元（比率21.25），显示零售多头被大量清洗。
macro_onchain.en: Whale data: ETH 24h net outflow 1.37M tokens (7d net outflow 2.42M), stablecoin net outflow $7.57M, indicating whale distribution. SOL 24h net inflow 54.5K tokens (7d net inflow 2.99M), stablecoin net inflow $300K, indicating accelerated whale accumulation. Funding rates: BTC 0.0042% (slightly positive), ETH 0.0023% (slightly positive), SOL -0.0088% (negative), BNB -0.0061% (negative), DOGE -0.0082% (negative), SOL and altcoins have negative funding, indicating crowded retail shorts. Liquidation data: All coins have long liquidations far exceeding shorts (L/S ratio >2), SOL long $3.17M vs short $149K (ratio 21.25), showing heavy retail long flush.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BTC（得分0.0014，排名1）相对最强，但得分接近零，表明市场整体弱势。ETH（得分-0.0112，排名2）和山寨币（SOL -0.0357，BNB -0.0387，DOGE -0.0347）得分均为负，显示普遍疲软。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score普遍负值（-1.5至-1.8），表明成交量低于历史均值，市场活跃度低。资金费率Z-Score：BTC 0.36（正常），ETH -0.17（略负），SOL -1.19（显著负），BNB -1.35（显著负），DOGE -1.47（显著负），SOL和山寨币资金费率显著负向偏离，统计上异常，暗示零售空头过度拥挤，存在轧空风险。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib rankings: BTC (score 0.0014, rank 1) is relatively strongest, but score near zero indicates overall market weakness. ETH (score -0.0112, rank 2) and alts (SOL -0.0357, BNB -0.0387, DOGE -0.0347) have negative scores, showing widespread weakness. Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores are negative (-1.5 to -1.8), indicating below-average volume and low market activity. Funding Z-Scores: BTC 0.36 (normal), ETH -0.17 (slightly negative), SOL -1.19 (significantly negative), BNB -1.35 (significantly negative), DOGE -1.47 (significantly negative), SOL and alts show significant negative deviations, statistically anomalous, suggesting overcrowded retail shorts and squeeze risk.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI中性（47.4），ADX中等（21.1），NATR 2.67%（波动率中等）；2) 上下影线比率：上影6%/下影48%，显示卖压强但下影线长，可能有支撑；3) 多空爆仓比：21.25（极端多头爆仓），零售多头正被清洗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：24h净流入5.45万SOL（加速积累）。结论：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底）。理由：价格下跌但鲸鱼在积累（Token Net Flow正），同时零售多头被大量爆仓（L/S比率高），符合鲸鱼在零售恐慌时吸筹的特征。RSI未极端（47.4），但鲸鱼信号强，允许中性RSI入场。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI neutral (47.4), ADX moderate (21.1), NATR 2.67% (moderate volatility); 2) Wick ratios: upper 6%/lower 48%, showing selling pressure but long lower wick suggests potential support; 3) Liquidation L/S ratio: 21.25 (extreme long liquidation), retail longs being flushed; 4) Whale net flow: 24h net inflow 54.5K SOL (accelerated accumulation). Verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION. Reason: Price is down but whales are accumulating (positive Token Net Flow), while retail longs are heavily liquidated (high L/S ratio), fitting whale accumulation during retail panic. RSI is not extreme (47.4), but whale signal is strong, allowing entry at neutral RSI.

This decision is based on SOL's strong whale accumulation signal (24h net inflow acceleration) and extreme long liquidation (L/S 21.25), but must cautiously control position size due to overall market weakness.

invalidation.en: If price breaks below 84.0 (based on NATR 2.67% × 1.5 ≈ 4.0% from entry 87.20), whale accumulation fails, stop loss exit.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市，价格低于SMA200，宏观信号矛盾（VIX高但日元弱），无重大新驱动，属于已定价环境。Qlib排名显示BTC/ETH相对最强，SOL/DOGE最弱，但Z-Score显示成交量普遍低迷（vol_z < -1.5），资金费率Z-Score异常（BTC/ETH正，SOL/DOGE负）。【痛苦交易】BTC和BNB存在LONG_FLUSH（多空爆仓比>2），但RSI中性（55/53），未达极端值，禁止追空；SOL有鲸鱼积累（24h净流入61.7K SOL）和负资金费率（-0.0103%），但L/S比高达7.24（多头被大量清洗），需等待RSI<30或下影线确认支撑。【战场纪律】SOL的NATR为2.71%，止损需至少4.07%，当前持仓浮亏-6.67%，风险较高。【假设分析】选择剧本3（鲸鱼前跑）：SOL鲸鱼积累与零售恐慌（负资金费率、高L/S比）形成背离，但需严格等待技术确认。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality】Market is in bear regime (price < SMA200), with mixed macro signals (high VIX but weak JPY), no major new drivers—priced-in environment. Qlib ranks BTC/ETH strongest, SOL/DOGE weakest, but Z-Scores show low volume (vol_z < -1.5) and funding anomalies (BTC/ETH positive, SOL/DOGE negative). 【Pain Trade】BTC and BNB have LONG_FLUSH (L/S ratio >2), but RSI neutral (55/53), not extreme—avoid chasing shorts. SOL shows whale accumulation (24h net inflow 61.7K SOL) and negative funding (-0.0103%), but L/S ratio is 7.24 (longs heavily flushed), requiring RSI <30 or lower wick for support confirmation. 【Tactical Discipline】SOL's NATR is 2.71%, requiring stop loss ≥4.07%; current position has -6.67% floating loss, high risk. 【Scenario】Select Hypothesis 3 (Whale Front-Run): SOL whale accumulation diverges from retail panic (negative funding, high L/S ratio), but strict technical confirmation needed.

macro_onchain.en: Whale Flow: SOL shows 24h net inflow 232,726.3 SOL (7d inflow 2,989,685.2 SOL), whales accumulating; ETH net outflow -4,723,321.7 ETH, whales distributing. Funding: All coins positive but low (0.0037%-0.0100%), retail longs slightly crowded but not extreme. Liquidations: SOL and BNB have high L/S ratios (6.52 and 2.77), retail longs flushed; BTC L/S ratio 3.67 also high.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BNB（1）和BTC（2）得分最高（0.1002和0.0982），相对强势；DOGE（5）得分最低（0.0096），弱势。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score普遍<-1.1（如SOL -1.48），显示市场活跃度显著偏低；资金费率Z-Score在0.31-1.2，无极端偏差。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib Rankings: BNB (1) and BTC (2) highest scores (0.1002 and 0.0982), relatively strong; DOGE (5) lowest (0.0096), weak. Z-Score Anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all <-1.1 (e.g., SOL -1.48), indicating significantly low activity; Funding Z-Scores 0.31-1.2, no extreme deviations.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI中性（48-56），ADX中等（18-26），NATR适中（1.68%-3.08%），无极端动量；2) SOL和BNB下影线比率高（55%和39%），显示支撑；3) SOL和BNB的L/S爆仓比高（6.52和2.77），零售多头被清洗；4) SOL鲸鱼净流入（积累），ETH净流出（减持）。最终判断：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底）——价格下跌中，鲸鱼积累（SOL）且零售多头被清洗，但RSI不极端，适合左侧布局。

Verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION – price dropping, whales accumulating (SOL) and retail longs flushed, but RSI not extreme, suitable for left-side entry.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观风险偏好下降（VIX 23.75，DXY 99.06），但ETF资金流入（BTC $462M，ETH $169M）提供支撑，属于已定价的混合环境。Qlib排名显示BTC（0.0533）和BNB（0.0516）相对最强，但Z-Score显示成交量普遍偏低（vol_z -1.5至-1.9），市场流动性不足。【痛苦交易】BTC和BNB的L/S爆仓比高达3.33和2.77，显示零售多头拥挤，存在长线挤压风险；SOL的L/S比6.17更极端，但鲸鱼数据显示24h净流入197,890 SOL（24h情绪0.03 > 7d -0.02），表明鲸鱼在加速吸筹，可能形成轧空燃料。【假设分析】选择“鲸鱼前跑”剧本：跟随SOL的鲸鱼积累信号，利用零售多头被清洗（L/S比高）的时机，在技术面中性时入场做多。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200) with macro risk-off (VIX 23.75, DXY 99.06), but ETF inflows ($462M BTC, $169M ETH) provide support, creating a mixed, priced-in environment. Qlib ranks show BTC (0.0533) and BNB (0.0516) as relatively strongest, but Z-Scores indicate low volume (vol_z -1.5 to -1.9), signaling weak liquidity.【Pain Trade】BTC and BNB have high L/S liquidation ratios (3.33 and 2.77), showing crowded retail longs with squeeze risk; SOL's L/S ratio is extreme at 6.17, but whale data shows 24h net inflow of 197,890 SOL (24h sentiment 0.03 > 7d -0.02), indicating accelerating whale accumulation and potential short squeeze fuel.【Scenario】Selected 'Whale Front-Run' scenario: follow SOL's whale accumulation signal, capitalizing on retail long flush (high L/S ratio) to enter a long position while technicals are neutral.

Funding: SOL at 0.0100% (neutral-high), but L/S liquidation ratio 6.17 shows heavy retail long flush, suggesting squeeze potential. No clear whale inflow signals for ETH and BTC.

quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib Analysis: BTC ranks 1st (0.0533), BNB 2nd (0.0516), ETH 3rd (0.042), SOL 4th (0.0298), DOGE 5th (-0.0128). Z-Score Anomalies: All coins have volume Z-Score below -1.5 (e.g., SOL vol_z -1.88), indicating significantly low volume and weak market participation; funding Z-Scores are elevated for ETH and SOL (1.52 and 1.43) but not extreme. SOL ranks low in Qlib, but whale inflow provides a divergence signal.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) SOL的RSI 53.1（中性），ADX 23.5（中等趋势），NATR 2.87%（中等波动）；2) 上下影线比率：上影线0%/下影线0%，无明确拒绝信号；3) 多空爆仓比：L/S=6.17，显示零售多头被大量清洗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：24h净流入197,890 SOL，加速积累。结论：WHALE_SQUEEZE（鲸鱼轧空）——鲸鱼在积累而零售多头被清洗，RSI中性，轧空动量可能推动价格上涨，无需等待极端RSI。

Verdict: WHALE_SQUEEZE – whales are accumulating while retail longs are being flushed, RSI neutral, squeeze momentum may drive price up without needing extreme RSI.

analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with global macro showing risk-off signals (VIX spiking, DXY strengthening), but yen weakness creates tension. Qlib rankings show BNB and BTC are relatively strong, but Z-Scores indicate low volume (vol_z all <-1.65) and high funding Z-Scores (ETH and SOL >1.5), suggesting overheated retail sentiment. Combined with 【Pain Trade】, SOL and BNB show clear long liquidation risks (L/S ratio >3), but no extreme RSI or clear whale accumulation signals are present, placing the market in a post-liquidation balance phase with partial fuel burned. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run), but awaiting whale confirmation or extreme RSI.

Z-Score Anomalies: Volume Z-Scores are negative (-1.65 to -2.0), indicating low market participation; Funding Z-Scores for ETH (1.6) and SOL (1.54) are significantly high, statistically anomalous, suggesting overheated retail sentiment and potential reversal.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI中性（40-60），ADX中等（<30），NATR中等，无极端动量；2) 上下影线比率显示部分支撑（SOL下影线43%，BNB下影线28%），但未达0.3阈值；3) 多空爆仓比：SOL为7.12，BNB为3.03，BTC为3.43，显示多头被大量清洗，燃料已消耗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH流出，SOL流入但矛盾，无明确积累。最终判断：SAFE_MR（安全均值回归）——市场处于爆仓后的平衡，RSI未极端，鲸鱼信号不明确，避免追涨杀跌。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI neutral (40-60), ADX moderate (<30), NATR moderate, no extreme momentum; 2) Wick ratios show some support (SOL lower wick 43%, BNB 28%) but not reaching 0.3 threshold; 3) L/S liquidation ratios: SOL 7.12, BNB 3.03, BTC 3.43, indicating longs heavily flushed, fuel burned; 4) Whale net flow: ETH outflow, SOL inflow but mixed, no clear accumulation. Final verdict: SAFE_MR (Safe Mean Reversion) – market in post-liquidation balance, RSI not extreme, whale signals unclear, avoid chasing moves.

Selecting 【Whale Squeeze】scenario, focusing on SOL's potential short squeeze due to negative funding (-0.0015%) and low RSI (53.1), pending breakout above resistance.

Price action aligns with macro sentiment, no new impulse drivers, likely priced in. Qlib rankings show BNB (0.0623 score) and BTC (0.0567 score) as relatively strongest, but Z-Scores indicate significantly low volume across all coins (vol_z < -1.5), suggesting poor liquidity. Combining 【Pain Trade】, ETH and BTC show LONG_FLUSH (L/S ratio >3), but RSI is not extreme (56.04/53.25), lacking clear reversal signals; SOL and BNB have balanced liquidation ratios, limited fuel. Selected 【Hypothesis】Scenario 3 (Whale Front-Run), seeking smart money accumulation signals from whale data, but must strictly adhere to bear regime rules (bias short, longs only with extreme accumulation).

Verdict: ETH and BTC in LONG_FLUSH but RSI not <30, ADX<25, whales not accumulating, 【KNIFE】 risk (falling knife), avoid longs; SOL has whale accumulation but balanced liquidation, RSI neutral, 【WHALE_SQUEEZE】 potential, but need stronger signals.

analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with a contradictory macro environment: stable Fed rates but spiking VIX and strong DXY indicate risk-off, while weak yen suggests some risk-on flows. Qlib rankings show BTC, ETH, BNB as relatively strong, but Z-Scores indicate low volume (vol_z all <-1.3) and high funding Z-Scores (BTC 1.87, ETH 1.36), signaling crowded retail longs. Combining 【Pain Trade】, SOL and BNB have significant squeeze fuel (L/S ratios 0.14 and 0.00), but caution is needed against chasing at high RSI. Selected 【Hypothesis】Scenario 3 (Whale Front-Run): prioritize SOL's squeeze opportunity due to whale net inflow of 1.514M SOL in 24h and negative funding, but await right-side signals to avoid catching knives.

analysis_summary.en:
【Narrative vs Reality】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), but Qlib rankings show DOGE, BTC, ETH as relatively strong, diverging from the macro bearishness. This likely represents a priced-in local rebound rather than a new impulse driver.
【Pain Trade & Discipline】BTC and SOL have clear squeeze fuel (L/S ratios 0.44 and 0.09), but RSI is overbought (BTC 70.6, SOL 66.3) with no whale inflow confirmation, posing 'ROCKET' risks. DOGE ranks #1 but lacks whale data, relying solely on technicals.
【Scenario Selection】Adopt the 'Whale Front-Run' scenario: prioritize ETH with whale inflow evidence (24h 1.055M ETH), but wait for RSI pullback or clear support signals to avoid chasing.

technical_signal.en: Technicals: Most coins have RSI in 66-71 range (near overbought), ADX 18-23 (moderate trend), NATR 1.78%-3.15% (normal volatility). DOGE has highest RSI 68.9 but no whale data; BTC most overbought at RSI 70.6.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH有显著流入（24h 105万ETH），但稳定币流出377万美元；SOL流入193万SOL，但情绪分负值（-0.23）。资金费率：DOGE最高0.0100%（多头拥挤），BTC最低0.0004%（中性）。
macro_onchain.en: Whale flow: ETH shows significant inflow (24h 1.055M ETH) but stablecoin outflow $3.777M; SOL inflow 1.938M SOL but sentiment negative (-0.23). Funding: DOGE highest at 0.0100% (crowded longs), BTC lowest at 0.0004% (neutral).

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：DOGE（0.2966）第一，BTC（0.2652）第二，ETH（0.2294）第三。Z-Score异常：DOGE资金费率Z 1.44（显著正偏差），BTC成交量Z -1.27（低活跃度），SOL成交量Z -1.44（最低）。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib rankings: DOGE (0.2966) #1, BTC (0.2652) #2, ETH (0.2294) #3. Z-Score anomalies: DOGE funding Z 1.44 (significant positive deviation), BTC volume Z -1.27 (low activity), SOL volume Z -1.44 (lowest).

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】评估：1) RSI普遍66+（超买），ADX 18-23（趋势中等），NATR正常；2) 上下影线比率：SOL上影40%/下影26%（有阻力），BTC下影39%（支撑强）；3) 多空爆仓比：BTC 0.44，SOL 0.09（轧空燃料）；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH流入但稳定币流出，SOL流入但情绪负。结论：ROCKET（挡火箭风险）— RSI超买且无鲸鱼强力确认，追涨危险。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Assessment: 1) RSI generally 66+ (overbought), ADX 18-23 (moderate trend), NATR normal; 2) Wick ratios: SOL upper 40%/lower 26% (resistance), BTC lower 39% (strong support); 3) L/S ratios: BTC 0.44, SOL 0.09 (squeeze fuel); 4) Whale net flow: ETH inflow but stablecoin outflow, SOL inflow but negative sentiment. Verdict: ROCKET — overbought RSI without strong whale confirmation makes chasing risky.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于矛盾状态：宏观层面呈现风险规避（DXY走强，VIX高位），但Layer 2新闻极度看涨（ETF流入、监管绿灯）。价格反应显示这些利好可能已部分定价，因为主要币种仍处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），且RSI普遍偏高（65-70），表明上涨动能可能衰竭。参考【Qlib排名】，DOGE（排名第一）和BTC（排名第二）显示相对强势，但DOGE的RSI 68.5和资金费率Z-Score 1.44（偏高）暗示零售追涨风险。结合【痛苦交易】，BTC和SOL的爆仓比（L/S=0.44和0.10）显示空头挤压燃料充足，但RSI均高于65，不符合左侧买入规则（RSI<30或4H下影线确认）。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置）：关注鲸鱼积累信号（如ETH的Token净流入105万ETH），但需等待技术面确认以避免追高。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a contradictory state: macro signals risk-off (strong DXY, high VIX), but Layer 2 news is overwhelmingly bullish (ETF inflows, regulatory green lights). Price action suggests these positives may be partially priced in, as major coins remain in bear markets (price < SMA200) with elevated RSI (65-70), indicating potential exhaustion. Referencing 【Qlib rankings】, DOGE (rank 1) and BTC (rank 2) show relative strength, but DOGE's RSI 68.5 and funding Z-Score 1.44 (high) suggest retail FOMO risk. Combining 【Pain Trade】, BTC and SOL have high short squeeze fuel (L/S ratios 0.44 and 0.10), but RSI above 65 violates left-side entry rules (RSI<30 or 4H lower wick confirmation). Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run): monitor whale accumulation signals (e.g., ETH's token net inflow 1.055M ETH), but await technical confirmation to avoid chasing.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI偏高（65-70），处于超买边缘；ADX中等（18-23），趋势强度一般；NATR在2-3%之间，波动率适中。BTC和SOL的爆仓比显示空头挤压潜力，但RSI未达极端水平。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have elevated RSI (65-70), near overbought; ADX moderate (18-23), trend strength modest; NATR 2-3%, volatility moderate. BTC and SOL show short squeeze potential via liquidation ratios, but RSI not at extremes.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH显示Token净流入105万ETH（24h vs 7d持平），但稳定币净流出377万美元，表明鲸鱼可能换仓而非纯积累。SOL的Token净流入193万SOL，但情绪评分负值（-0.23），暗示潜在抛压。资金费率：DOGE最高（0.0100%），Z-Score 1.44，零售多头拥挤；BTC最低（0.0002%），Z-Score -0.39，相对中性。
macro_onchain.en: Whale Data: ETH shows token net inflow 1.055M ETH (24h vs 7d flat), but stablecoin net outflow $3.777M, suggesting whale rotation rather than pure accumulation. SOL has token net inflow 1.938M SOL, but sentiment score negative (-0.23), indicating potential distribution. Funding: DOGE highest (0.0100%), Z-Score 1.44, retail long crowded; BTC lowest (0.0002%), Z-Score -0.39, relatively neutral.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：DOGE排名第一（得分0.2892），但RSI 68.5和资金费率Z-Score 1.44显示统计偏差——零售追涨可能导致回调。BTC排名第二（得分0.2623），资金费率Z-Score -0.39正常，但爆仓比0.44提供挤压燃料。成交量Z-Score普遍负值（-1.05至-1.49），表明市场参与度低，上涨缺乏量能支撑。
quantitative_analysis.en: Quantitative Analysis: Qlib ranks DOGE first (score 0.2892), but RSI 68.5 and funding Z-Score 1.44 show statistical deviation—retail FOMO may lead to pullback. BTC ranks second (score 0.2623), funding Z-Score -0.39 normal, but liquidation ratio 0.44 provides squeeze fuel. Volume Z-Scores negative across board (-1.05 to -1.49), indicating low participation and weak volume support for rallies.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 65-70偏高但未超72，ADX 18-23中等，NATR 2-3%正常；2) 上下影线比率：DOGE上影46%/下影22%显示上方阻力，SOL上影40%/下影16%类似；3) 多空爆仓比：BTC和SOL空头主导（L/S=0.44和0.10），但RSI>65，不符合均值回归买入条件；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOLToken流入，但稳定币流出或情绪负值，非明确积累。最终判断：ROCKET（挡火箭风险）——RSI偏高、爆仓燃料存在，但无RSI极端或明确鲸鱼积累确认，追涨风险高。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 65-70 elevated but not >72, ADX 18-23 moderate, NATR 2-3% normal; 2) Wick Ratios: DOGE upper 46%/lower 22% shows overhead resistance, SOL similar (40%/16%); 3) Liquidation Ratios: BTC and SOL short-dominated (L/S=0.44 and 0.10), but RSI>65 violates mean reversion buy rules; 4) Whale Net Flow: ETH and SOL token inflows but stablecoin outflows or negative sentiment, not clear accumulation. Verdict: ROCKET (blocking rocket risk)—elevated RSI with squeeze fuel, but no RSI extreme or confirmed whale accumulation, chasing longs is risky.

analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但Qlib排名显示DOGE/BTC/ETH相对强势，与宏观恐惧（BTC恐惧贪婪指数10）形成叙事分歧。这可能是已定价的反弹而非新驱动。
【痛苦交易与燃料】BTC和SOL存在明显轧空燃料（L/S爆仓比0.19和0.10），但RSI已超买（BTC 72.9，SOL 68.1），且无鲸鱼流入确认（SOL 24h情绪-0.23 vs 7d -0.22），表明上涨可能由空头平仓推动而非新资金。
【假设剧本】选择“鲸鱼前置”剧本：等待SOL突破前高$93.14确认右侧入场，避免在RSI高位追涨。
【纪律】遵守4D规则：不逆流动性（爆仓比失衡时等待），检查资金费率陷阱（SOL资金费率0.0042%中性）。
analysis_summary.en:
【Narrative vs Reality】Market is in bear regime (price < SMA200), but Qlib ranks DOGE/BTC/ETH as strongest, diverging from macro fear (BTC Fear Greed 10). This suggests a priced-in bounce rather than new impulse.
【Pain Trade & Fuel】BTC and SOL have clear squeeze fuel (L/S liquidation ratios 0.19 and 0.10), but RSI is overbought (BTC 72.9, SOL 68.1) and no whale inflow confirmation (SOL 24h sentiment -0.23 vs 7d -0.22), indicating move driven by short covering not new capital.
【Scenario】Select 'Whale Front-Run' scenario: Await SOL breakout above prior high $93.14 for right-side confirmation, avoid chasing at high RSI.
【Discipline】Follow 4D rules: Don't fight liquidity (wait during imbalanced liquidations), check funding trap (SOL funding 0.0042% neutral).

regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on 4E: 1) RSI state: BTC 72.9 >70 overbought, SOL 68.1 near overbought; ADX: BTC 20.4, SOL 20.1 (moderate trend); NATR: BTC 2.15%, SOL 3.03% (normal volatility). 2) Wick ratio: SOL upper 73%/lower 0% (shows overhead resistance). 3) Liquidation ratio: BTC L/S=0.19, SOL L/S=0.10 (short dominated). 4) Whale flow: SOL 24h sentiment negative (-0.23) and lower than 7d (-0.22), no accumulation signal. Verdict: ROCKET — RSI high and trend up, shorting against momentum dangerous; but no whale confirmation, chasing longs also risky.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但宏观新闻（特朗普支持加密改革）与价格走势出现分歧——利好消息并未推动价格突破，表明可能已定价或存在抛压。Qlib排名显示DOGE（第1）和BTC（第2）相对强势，但DOGE的成交量Z-Score高达1.44（异常活跃），结合其高RSI（70.12）和正资金费率（0.0100%），暗示零售追涨风险。痛苦交易方面，BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB均显示SHORT_SQUEEZE信号（空头爆仓远多于多头），但RSI普遍偏高（60-72），缺乏低RSI支撑，根据战场纪律，禁止在RSI>40时追多反弹。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置）：优先关注鲸鱼持续积累的SOL（24h代币净流入193.8万SOL），但需等待右侧突破确认，避免左侧接飞刀。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), but there's a divergence between macro news (Trump supporting crypto reform) and price action—bullish news hasn't driven breakouts, suggesting it may be priced in or facing distribution. Qlib rankings show DOGE (1st) and BTC (2nd) as relatively strong, but DOGE's volume Z-Score is high at 1.44 (abnormally active), coupled with high RSI (70.12) and positive funding (0.0100%), indicating retail FOMO risk. For pain trades, BTC, ETH, SOL, and BNB all show SHORT_SQUEEZE signals (short liquidations >> longs), but RSI is generally elevated (60-72), lacking low RSI support—per tactical discipline, avoid chasing longs with RSI > 40. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run): focus on SOL with sustained whale accumulation (24h token net inflow 1.938M SOL), but await right-side breakout confirmation to prevent left-side entry.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：主要币种RSI处于60-72（超买边缘），ADX普遍低于25（趋势不强），NATR在1.83%-3.22%（中等波动）。DOGE的RSI最高（70.12），但ADX仅15.6，显示动量不足。SOL的RSI为63.7，ADX 18.4，处于上升趋势但未超强。

Funding: DOGE, BNB positive (0.0100%), retail long; BTC, SOL negative (-0.0007% to -0.0010%), retail short. Liquidation ratio: BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB have very low L/S ratios (0.01-0.44), short liquidations dominate, providing squeeze fuel.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：DOGE排名第1（得分0.4396），但成交量Z-Score 1.44显著偏高，结合高RSI和正资金费率，可能为零售推动的虚假强势。BTC排名第2（得分0.332），资金费率Z-Score -0.62（负偏差），显示零售看空，但RSI 72.09超买，矛盾信号。SOL排名第5（得分0.2353），资金费率Z-Score 0.17接近中性，但鲸鱼流入显著，量化模型可能低估其潜力。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib analysis: DOGE ranks 1st (score 0.4396), but volume Z-Score 1.44 is significantly high, coupled with high RSI and positive funding, possibly retail-driven false strength. BTC ranks 2nd (score 0.332), funding Z-Score -0.62 (negative deviation), indicating retail bearishness, but RSI 72.09 is overbought—contradictory signals. SOL ranks 5th (score 0.2353), funding Z-Score 0.17 near neutral, but whale inflow is notable, quant model may underestimate potential.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI普遍60-72（偏高），ADX<25（趋势弱），NATR中等（1.83%-3.22%）；2) 上下影线比率：SOL下影线35%（有支撑），DOGE上下影线20-26%（平衡）；3) 多空爆仓比：空头爆仓远多于多头（L/S 0.01-0.44），但RSI未低于30，缺乏低RSI支撑；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOL代币净流入，但稳定币流出。结论：当前为ROCKET（挡火箭风险）——主要币种RSI偏高且空头爆仓提供上涨燃料，禁止逆势做空；但缺乏低RSI或明确底部信号，追多风险高，需等待右侧确认。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI generally 60-72 (elevated), ADX <25 (weak trend), NATR moderate (1.83%-3.22%); 2) Wick ratios: SOL lower wick 35% (support), DOGE upper/lower 20-26% (balanced); 3) Liquidation L/S ratio: shorts >> longs (0.01-0.44), but RSI not below 30, lacking low RSI support; 4) Whale net flow: token inflows for ETH and SOL, but stablecoin outflows. analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market shows conflicting signals: macro VIX spike (20.84) and DXY strength (98.8) indicate risk-off sentiment, but JPY weakness (USD/JPY 156.9) and Trump's crypto-supportive news provide risk-on catalysts. Price action suggests priced-in—positive news hasn't driven breakout, indicating weak upward momentum. Per Qlib rankings, DOGE (rank 1) and BTC (rank 2) show relative strength, but DOGE's Funding Z-Score of 1.44 (statistically high) signals crowded retail longs. Pain trade analysis reveals SHORT_SQUEEZE signals for BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB (low L/S ratios), but RSI not below 30, lacking safe mean-reversion conditions. Selected Scenario 3 (Whale Front-Run), focusing on SOL with sustained whale accumulation (24h Token Net Flow 1.94M SOL), but awaiting right-side breakout confirmation to avoid left-side risk.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种处于熊市（价格<SMA200），日线趋势看跌。4H RSI普遍在63-72（超买区域），ADX 15-22（趋势偏弱），NATR 1.8-3.2%（中等波动）。BTC RSI 72.3最高，接近超买；SOL RSI 63.6相对较低。上下影线显示SOL下影线比率34%（支撑迹象），BTC上影线比率13%（阻力较小）。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins in bear market (price < SMA200), daily trend bearish. 4H RSI ranges 63-72 (overbought), ADX 15-22 (weak trend), NATR 1.8-3.2% (moderate volatility). BTC RSI 72.3 highest, nearing overbought; SOL RSI 63.6 relatively lower. Wick ratios show SOL lower wick 34% (support signs), BTC upper wick 13% (less resistance).

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH 24h Token Net Flow 1.06M ETH（积极），但Stablecoin Net Flow -$3.78M（流出）。SOL 24h Token Net Flow 1.94M SOL（显著积累），Stablecoin Net Flow $831k（流入）。资金费率：DOGE、BNB为0.0100%（偏高），ETH 0.0081%，BTC 0.0012%，SOL -0.0022%（轻微负值）。爆仓痛苦：BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB的L/S比率极低（0.07-0.40），显示空头爆仓主导，存在轧空燃料。
macro_onchain.en: Whale data: ETH 24h Token Net Flow 1.06M ETH (positive), but Stablecoin Net Flow -$3.78M (outflow). SOL 24h Token Net Flow 1.94M SOL (significant accumulation), Stablecoin Net Flow $831k (inflow). Funding rates: DOGE, BNB at 0.0100% (high), ETH 0.0081%, BTC 0.0012%, SOL -0.0022% (slightly negative). Liquidation pain: BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB have very low L/S ratios (0.07-0.40), indicating short liquidations dominate, providing squeeze fuel.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：DOGE排名第1（得分0.3207），但Funding Z-Score 1.44显著偏高，统计异常表明零售多头过度拥挤，风险较高。BTC排名第2（得分0.3048），Funding Z-Score -0.16接近中性。SOL排名第5（得分0.2097），但鲸鱼积累强劲（Token Net Flow高），形成量化与链上数据的背离。成交量Z-Score普遍为负（-0.18至-1.10），显示市场参与度低。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib analysis: DOGE ranks 1st (score 0.3207), but Funding Z-Score 1.44 significantly high, statistical anomaly indicates overcrowded retail longs, high risk. BTC ranks 2nd (score 0.3048), Funding Z-Score -0.16 near neutral. SOL ranks 5th (score 0.2097), but strong whale accumulation (high Token Net Flow), creating divergence between quant and on-chain data. Volume Z-Scores negative (-0.18 to -1.10), indicating low market participation.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 63-72（超买区域），ADX 15-22（趋势弱），NATR 1.8-3.2%（中等波动）；2) 上下影线比率：SOL下影线34%（支撑），BTC上影线13%（阻力弱）；3) 多空爆仓比：L/S比率极低（0.07-0.40），空头爆仓主导；4) 鲸鱼净流向：SOL Token Net Flow积极（1.94M SOL），但ETH Stablecoin流出。综合判断：当前市场处于ROCKET（挡火箭风险）状态——RSI超买但趋势弱，空头爆仓提供上涨燃料，但缺乏安全均值回归条件（RSI未>72或<28）。禁止盲目做空或追高。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 63-72 (overbought), ADX 15-22 (weak trend), NATR 1.8-3.2% (moderate volatility); 2) Wick ratios: SOL lower wick 34% (support), BTC upper wick 13% (weak resistance); 3) Liquidation L/S ratio: very low (0.07-0.40), short liquidations dominate; 4) Whale net flow: SOL Token Net Flow positive (1.94M SOL), but ETH Stablecoin outflow. Verdict: ROCKET (blocking rocket risk)—RSI overbought but trend weak, short liquidations provide upward fuel, but lacking safe mean-reversion conditions (RSI not >72 or <28). Avoid blind shorting or chasing highs.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：避免在RSI>65时追涨，即使有轧空燃料；当前市场类似，需等待更安全入场点。聚焦鲸鱼积累币种（如SOL），但必须等待右侧突破确认，防止左侧过早入场。
reflection.en: Learned from history: Avoid chasing rallies when RSI >65 without clear support, even with squeeze fuel; current market is similar, wait for safer entry. Focus on whale-accumulated coins (e.g., SOL), but must await right-side breakout confirmation to prevent premature left-side entry.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于矛盾状态：宏观层面呈现风险规避（DXY走强，VIX高位），但Layer 2新闻极度看涨，形成叙事分歧。价格走势与鲸鱼行为显示关键信号：BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB均处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但所有币种都出现【SHORT_SQUEEZE】信号（空头爆仓远高于多头），尤其是BTC空头爆仓高达$1.6B（L/S比率0.10），表明零售空头过度拥挤。Qlib排名显示BTC（#1）和ETH（#2）相对最强，但它们的资金费率Z-Score（0.42和1.16）未达极端，而DOGE的资金费率Z-Score高达1.42（统计显著偏高），暗示零售多头过热。结合【痛苦交易】分析：当前空头爆仓是主要燃料，但RSI普遍在60-72区间（未超买），且无明确4H上影线拒绝，因此不宜立即做空；同时，价格未出现大幅下跌，缺乏左侧买入信号。选择【Whale Front-Run】剧本：关注鲸鱼持续积累的币种（如SOL 24h净流入1.9M代币），等待右侧突破确认。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a contradictory state: macro signals risk-off (DXY strengthening, VIX high), but Layer 2 news is overwhelmingly bullish, creating a narrative divergence. Price action and whale data reveal key signals: BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB are all in bear markets (price < SMA200), but all show 【SHORT_SQUEEZE】 signals (short liquidations far exceed longs), especially BTC with $1.6B short liquidations (L/S ratio 0.10), indicating overcrowded retail shorts. Qlib rankings show BTC (#1) and ETH (#2) as relatively strongest, but their funding Z-Scores (0.42 and 1.16) are not extreme, while DOGE's funding Z-Score is high at 1.42 (statistically significant), suggesting overheated retail longs. Combining 【Pain Trade】 analysis: current short liquidations are the primary fuel, but RSI is generally in the 60-72 range (not overbought), and no clear 4H upper wick rejections are present, so shorting immediately is not justified; meanwhile, prices haven't dropped significantly, lacking left-side buy signals. Selected 【Whale Front-Run】 scenario: focus on coins with sustained whale accumulation (e.g., SOL with 24h net inflow of 1.9M tokens), awaiting right-side breakout confirmation.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI在63-72区间（BTC 71.78，ETH 69.21），处于中性偏强但未超买；ADX普遍低于25（SOL 18.4，BTC 18.3），趋势强度中等；NATR在1.82%-3.19%（BNB最低，SOL最高），波动率适中；上下影线比率显示BTC下影线占71%（支撑较强），SOL下影线占37%（支撑一般）。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have RSI in the 63-72 range (BTC 71.78, ETH 69.21), neutral-strong but not overbought; ADX generally below 25 (SOL 18.4, BTC 18.3), moderate trend strength; NATR ranges 1.82%-3.19% (BNB lowest, SOL highest), moderate volatility; wick ratios show BTC with 71% lower wicks (strong support), SOL with 37% lower wicks (moderate support).

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据与资金费率：SOL出现显著鲸鱼积累（24h代币净流入1,938,056 SOL，稳定币净流入$831k），而ETH代币净流入但稳定币净流出（$-3.8M），暗示分歧。资金费率方面，DOGE（0.0098%）和BNB（0.0100%）较高，零售多头拥挤；SOL为负（-0.0021%），零售空头略多。爆仓数据显示所有币种空头爆仓远高于多头（L/S比率：BTC 0.10，ETH 0.39，SOL 0.12，BNB 0.01），形成轧空燃料。
macro_onchain.en: Whale flow & funding: SOL shows significant whale accumulation (24h token net inflow 1,938,056 SOL, stablecoin net inflow $831k), while ETH has token inflow but stablecoin outflow ($-3.8M), suggesting divergence. Funding rates: DOGE (0.0098%) and BNB (0.0100%) are high, indicating crowded retail longs; SOL is negative (-0.0021%), slightly crowded retail shorts. Liquidation data shows short liquidations far exceed longs across all coins (L/S ratios: BTC 0.10, ETH 0.39, SOL 0.12, BNB 0.01), creating squeeze fuel.

quantitative_analysis.zh: 分析Qlib排名：BTC（得分0.2915，排名#1）和ETH（0.2777，排名#2）相对最强，但它们的资金费率Z-Score（0.42和1.16）未达统计极端（>2），表明资金费率异常不显著。DOGE排名#3，但资金费率Z-Score高达1.42，接近显著水平，结合高资金费率（0.0098%），提示零售多头过热风险。SOL排名#5（得分0.2064），但鲸鱼积累强劲，形成量化与链上数据的背离。
quantitative_analysis.en: Analyze Qlib rankings: BTC (score 0.2915, rank #1) and ETH (0.2777, rank #2) are relatively strongest, but their funding Z-Scores (0.42 and 1.16) are not statistically extreme (>2), indicating funding anomalies are not significant. DOGE ranks #3, but its funding Z-Score is high at 1.42, nearing significance, combined with high funding rate (0.0098%), suggesting overheated retail long risk. SOL ranks #5 (score 0.2064), but has strong whale accumulation, creating a divergence between quantitative and on-chain data.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI在63-72（未超买），ADX<25（趋势不强），NATR适中（1.82%-3.19%）；2) 上下影线比率：BTC下影线71%（支撑强），但无上影线拒绝；3) 多空爆仓比：空头爆仓远高于多头（L/S比率均<0.5），显示空头被挤压；4) 鲸鱼净流向：SOL净流入显著，ETH稳定币净流出。综合判断：当前无【KNIFE】风险（价格未大跌，RSI未<30），无【ROCKET】风险（RSI未>70，ADX不高），但也不符合【SAFE_MR】（RSI未极端，无明确反转蜡烛）。市场处于中性偏强状态，等待右侧信号。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI in 63-72 (not overbought), ADX <25 (trend not strong), NATR moderate (1.82%-3.19%); 2) Wick ratios: BTC has 71% lower wicks (strong support), but no upper wick rejections; 3) Liquidation L/S ratios: short liquidations far exceed longs (all ratios <0.5), indicating shorts being squeezed; 4) Whale net flow: SOL shows significant inflow, ETH has stablecoin outflow. Verdict: No 【KNIFE】 risk (price not dropping sharply, RSI not <30), no 【ROCKET】 risk (RSI not >70, ADX not high), but not 【SAFE_MR】 either (RSI not extreme, no clear reversal candles). Market is neutral-strong, awaiting right-side signals.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于宏观风险规避环境（VIX 20.51，DXY 98.77），但政治叙事（特朗普支持加密）与监管进展（Kraken Fed账户）提供积极催化剂，形成分歧。价格走势显示为已定价的混合趋势，无明显新驱动力。参考【Qlib排名】，BTC（0.2399）和ETH（0.2303）相对最强，但所有币种RSI均处于60-68过热区间，Z-Score显示资金费率普遍偏高（ETH 1.0，DOGE 1.25），表明零售多头拥挤。结合【痛苦交易】，所有主要币种均显示SHORT_SQUEEZE信号（L/S比率极低：BTC 0.15，ETH 0.45，SOL 0.15，BNB 0.01），但RSI未达极端（>70），且ADX普遍<20（趋势弱），当前处于【战场纪律】的“火箭阻挡”风险区，不宜追高。选择【假设分析】剧本：等待均值回归机会，避免在RSI过热时开仓。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a macro risk-off environment (VIX 20.51, DXY 98.77), but political narratives (Trump's crypto support) and regulatory progress (Kraken Fed account) provide positive catalysts, creating a divergence. Price action shows a mixed trend with no clear new impulse, likely priced in. Referencing 【Qlib rankings】, BTC (0.2399) and ETH (0.2303) are relatively strongest, but all coins have RSI in the overbought 60-68 range, and Z-Scores indicate high funding rates (ETH 1.0, DOGE 1.25), signaling crowded retail longs. Combining 【Pain Trade】, all major coins show SHORT_SQUEEZE signals (extremely low L/S ratios: BTC 0.15, ETH 0.45, SOL 0.15, BNB 0.01), but RSI is not extreme (>70) and ADX is generally <20 (weak trend), placing us in the 【Tactical Discipline】'rocket blocking' risk zone—avoid chasing highs. Selected 【Scenario】: Wait for mean reversion opportunities, avoid opening positions at overheated RSI.

SOL sentiment negative (24h -0.26), token net inflow 1,938,056.3 SOL, stablecoin net inflow $750,981, funding rate -0.0025% slightly negative. quantitative_analysis.en: Quantitative: Qlib rankings show BTC (0.2399) and ETH (0.2303) as top, but all coins have overheated RSI, Z-Score anomalies indicate high funding rates (ETH 1.0, DOGE 1.25), volume Z-Scores are negative (-1.1 to -1.55), suggesting price rises on low volume may be unsustainable. Statistical deviations support waiting for pullbacks.

regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 61-68 overbought but not extreme (>70), ADX<20 weak trend, NATR moderate (2-3%); 2) Upper/Lower Wick Ratios: ETH upper 47%/lower 7%, SOL upper 10%/lower 1%, showing some upper wicks but weak lower wicks; 3) Liquidation L/S ratios extremely low (<0.5), short squeeze fuel abundant; 4) Whale net flow: ETH token inflow but stablecoin outflow, SOL token and stablecoin inflow. Verdict: ROCKET (blocking rocket risk), because RSI is overheated, ADX weak, high funding rates indicate crowded retail longs, but short squeeze fuel may drive further upside, making counter-trend shorts or chasing longs high-risk.

Z-Score Anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all negative (-1.43 to -1.83), significantly below historical mean, indicating weak volume support for rallies; Funding Z-Scores positive for most (0.73-1.21 except SOL), statistically high, confirming retail long overheating.

Verdict: ROCKET (blocking rocket risk) – current rally fueled by short squeezes, RSI overbought with no pullback signals, chasing longs risks buying at tops.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但存在明显的鲸鱼与散户分歧。宏观环境显示风险规避（VIX飙升、DXY走强），但加密货币内部出现轧空燃料（BTC、ETH、BNB的短仓爆仓远高于长仓）。【Qlib排名】显示BTC（排名1）和BNB（排名2）相对强势，但Z-Score异常：BTC资金费率Z-Score为-0.07（轻微负值），BNB为0.89（正值），表明散户在BNB上做多拥挤，在BTC上略微做空。【痛苦交易】BTC、ETH、BNB的短仓爆仓比（L/S）极低（0.05、0.04、0.02），显示大量散户短仓被清算，为轧空提供燃料，但价格尚未突破关键阻力，需等待右侧确认。【假设分析】选择“鲸鱼前置”剧本：鲸鱼在价格下跌时积累（如ETH的24h情绪得分0.01高于7d的0.04），而散户恐慌性短仓被爆，可能引发轧空反弹。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), but there is a clear divergence between whales and retail. Macro shows risk-off (VIX spiking, DXY strengthening), but crypto internal signals show squeeze fuel (short liquidations far exceed longs for BTC, ETH, BNB).【Qlib Ratings】indicate BTC (rank 1) and BNB (rank 2) are relatively strong, but Z-Score anomalies: BTC funding Z-Score is -0.07 (slightly negative), BNB is 0.89 (positive), showing retail longs crowded in BNB and slight shorts in BTC.【Pain Trade】Short liquidation ratios (L/S) for BTC, ETH, BNB are extremely low (0.05, 0.04, 0.02), indicating massive retail short liquidations providing squeeze fuel, but price hasn't broken key resistance—await right-side confirmation.【Scenario】Select 'Whale Front-Run' scenario: whales accumulating on dips (e.g., ETH's 24h sentiment 0.01 > 7d 0.04) while retail shorts are being liquidated, potentially triggering a squeeze bounce.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) SOL RSI 56.5（中性），ADX 14.7（低），NATR 3.05%（中等）；上下影线比率：上影53%/下影39%（支撑略强）；多空爆仓比2.03（多头风险）；鲸鱼净流向正（吸筹）。DOGE RSI 40.99（超卖），ADX 12.0（低），NATR 2.91%（中等）；上下影线比率：上影38%/下影52%（抛压强）；多空爆仓比平衡；鲸鱼净流向无数据。最终判断：SOL处于“无趋势震荡”（ADX<20），DOGE处于“无趋势超卖”（ADX<20且RSI<41），均非KNIFE/ROCKET/SAFE_MR，而是“等待趋势确认”状态。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) SOL RSI 56.5 (neutral), ADX 14.7 (low), NATR 3.05% (moderate); Wick Ratio: upper 53%/lower 39% (slight support); L/S ratio 2.03 (long risk); Whale net flow positive (accumulation). DOGE RSI 40.99 (oversold), ADX 12.0 (low), NATR 2.91% (moderate); Wick Ratio: upper 38%/lower 52% (selling pressure); L/S ratio balanced; Whale net flow no data. Verdict: SOL is in 'trendless chop' (ADX<20), DOGE is in 'trendless oversold' (ADX<20 and RSI<41), neither KNIFE/ROCKET/SAFE_MR, but 'awaiting trend confirmation'.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓：SOL多头（入场价85.54，浮盈3.41%），未达5%调整止损线。总权益$3929.70，可用多头额度$1367，未超限。
portfolio_status.en: Portfolio: SOL long (entry 85.54, floating PnL 3.41%), not at 5% stop-loss adjustment threshold. Total equity $3929.70, available long room $1367, within limits.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：在ADX<20时开仓（如SOL在$78.81和$85.49）易受震荡止损，必须严格遵守“ADX无交易区”规则，等待趋势确认。
reflection.en: Learned from history: Opening positions when ADX<20 (e.g., SOL at $78.81 and $85.49) risks whipsaw stops; must strictly obey 'ADX No-Trade Zone' rule and wait for trend confirmation.

entry_reason.zh: 现有SOL多头持仓浮盈3.41%，未达5%调整线，但ADX<20且资金费率正（零售多头拥挤），提前调整止损以保护利润。
entry_reason.en: Existing SOL long has floating PnL 3.41%, not at 5% adjustment threshold, but ADX<20 and positive funding (crowded retail longs), adjust stop-loss early to protect profits.

invalidation.zh: 若价格跌破$84.0（入场价下方约1.8%），或ADX持续<20且RSI转向下跌，则平仓。
invalidation.en: Close if price breaks below $84.0 (~1.8% below entry), or if ADX remains <20 and RSI turns downward.
